settings.heading: Ayurvedic Ingredients & Certification
settings.content: Contains pure Mahanarayan Oil, Gandhapura, Nilgiri, Kapur, and Shallaki. Ayush Certified & 100% Herbal formulation.

settings.heading: Usage & Storage Instructions
settings.content: Apply 5-10 drops on affected joint/muscle. Massage gently for 3-5 mins twice daily. Store in a cool, dry place.

settings.heading: Why Thousands Trust Aayu Pain Relief Oil

settings.title: Mahanarayan Oil
settings.benefit: Deep muscle relaxation, joint cartilage nourishment, and natural mobility restoration.

settings.title: Gandhapura (Wintergreen)
settings.benefit: Rich in natural methyl salicylate for rapid, targeted pain numbing and anti-swelling.

settings.title: Nilgiri (Eucalyptus)
settings.benefit: Delivers soothing thermal warmth to relieve nerve stiffness and joint inflammation.

settings.title: Kapur (Camphor)
settings.benefit: Stimulates local micro-circulation, accelerating tissue healing and fast pain relief.

settings.title: Shallaki (Boswellia)
settings.benefit: Time-tested Ayurvedic herb to reduce morning stiffness and preserve joint flexibility.

settings.heading: Powerful Natural Ingredients For Fast Relief

settings.title: Warm 5-10 Drops
settings.instruction: Pour 5 to 10 drops of oil onto your palm and rub palms together gently to warm up the Ayurvedic formulation.

settings.title: Gentle Massage (3-5 Mins)
settings.instruction: Dab onto joint or sore muscle area and massage gently in clockwise circular motion for 3 to 5 minutes until absorbed.

settings.title: Twice Daily Application
settings.instruction: Apply twice daily (once in the morning and once before bedtime) for continuous mobility and zero morning stiffness.

settings.heading: How To Apply Aayu Pain Relief Oil

settings.review_title: Relief From Knee Pain in 7 Days!
settings.comment: I was suffering from severe knee stiffness for months. After massaging with Aayu Pain oil for 7 days, my pain has reduced drastically. Very effective!
Working long hours caused chronic lower back ache. Aayu Pain oil absorbs quickly without stickiness and gives deep warmth and relief instantly.
Bought this for my 68 year old father who had trouble climbing stairs. He applies it twice daily and feels great comfort in his joints.
